medicines.name: Cetaphil Gentle Cleanser
medicines.usage: Use twice daily as a preventive skincare routine
medicines.warning: Consult a dermatologist before starting any new product

precautions: Stay hydrated and eat a balanced diet

medicines.name: Salicylic Acid Face Wash
medicines.usage: Use twice daily on affected areas

medicines.name: Benzoyl Peroxide 2.5% Gel
medicines.usage: Apply thin layer to affected area once daily at night
medicines.warning: Consult a dermatologist before use. May cause dryness.

precautions: Avoid oil-based moisturizers and heavy makeup
Do not pop or squeeze pimples
Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily
Avoid high sugar and dairy foods

medicines.name: Clindamycin Phosphate Gel 1%
medicines.usage: Apply to affected area twice daily after cleansing
medicines.warning: Prescription required. Consult a dermatologist before use.

medicines.name: Niacinamide Serum 10%
medicines.usage: Apply 2-3 drops to face after cleansing before moisturizer

precautions: Consult a dermatologist if condition persists beyond 4 weeks
Reduce stress through exercise or meditation

medicines.name: Isotretinoin (Accutane)
medicines.warning: Strictly requires dermatologist prescription. Do not self-medicate.

medicines.name: Doxycycline 100mg
medicines.warning: Antibiotic requires prescription. Consult a dermatologist immediately.

precautions: Do not attempt to self-treat severe acne
Keep skin clean and moisturized with gentle products
Document your skin condition with photos for your doctor
